title: Coverage Gap
description: A single coverage gap extracted from a coverage report.

gap_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this gap.

covergroup.description: Name of the covergroup containing this gap.

coverpoint.description: Name of the coverpoint containing this gap.

hit_count.description: Current hit count for this bin.

goal.description: Target hit count for this bin.

source_file.description: Path to the coverage model source file.

source_line.description: Line number in the coverage model source.

cluster_id.description: Cluster identifier for grouping related gaps.

related_register.description: Register field likely controlling this gap, or null if unknown.

related_spec_section.description: Relevant spec section identifier, or null if unknown.

related_rtl_signal.description: Relevant RTL signal, or null if unknown.
